name: popover
description: The shared positioning + light-dismiss + focus-return SEAM for every non-modal overlay (dropdown-menu, select, combobox, tooltip, hover-card, date-picker, context-menu, command, mentions). CONTROLLED / UNCONTROLLED headless overlay (NOT a bespoke WIRE component). UNCONTROLLED by default (controlled=false): the panel is always in the DOM; the browser's native popover API (popovertarget) shows/hides it client-side — zero JS, zero wire round-trip. CONTROLLED (controlled=true): pass `open` from the caller's own @Wire field; the server gates panel presence. Show/hide via the native HTML `popover` attribute; position via CSS Anchor Positioning (anchor-name / position-anchor / position-area + flip-block fallback) — all twelve placement positions supported. The `popover-anchor.enhancer.ts` handles the one irreducible client bit: focus-return on light-dismiss (click-outside) via data-lv-opener, autofocus delegation via data-lv-autofocus, and wire sync of close() in controlled mode. Panel content is OWNED server-rendered markup (the `content` Content slot). Optional `title` + `description` render a PopoverHeader and make the panel a labelled dialog (role=dialog + aria-labelledby). Three variant surfaces: default | muted | destructive. Optional decorative arrow/caret (withArrow). Replaces the <lv-popover> Lit island and the old PARTIAL. CSP-clean, no inline handlers, no @floating-ui/dom.
docs: Copies popover.jte to your JTE root at lievit/popover.jte, reached as @template.lievit.popover(...). Required params: `id` (unique panel id; derives the trigger id as <id>-trigger), `trigger` content (label/icon inside the button), `content` panel body (server-rendered, never a <slot>). By default (controlled=false) the panel is always in the DOM and the browser's native popover API handles open/close — zero JS, zero server round-trip. To gate panel presence from the server, set controlled=true and pass `open` from your caller's @Wire boolean field. Set `placement` (12 positions: bottom-start | bottom | bottom-end | top-start | top | top-end | left-start | left | left-end | right-start | right | right-end; default: bottom-start), `type` (auto|manual|hint; default: auto), `offset` (gap px; default: 4), `withArrow` (decorative caret; default: false), `variant` (default|muted|destructive; default: default), `disabled` (default: false). Optional `title` + `description` add a PopoverHeader and make the panel a labelled dialog (role=dialog + aria-labelledby). The popover-anchor.enhancer.ts must be registered in the runtime (installPopoverAnchor) for focus-return on light-dismiss and autofocus delegation.
